summary: Phase 1 In-House RM Production Module testing completed. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified and working correctly. TechOps RM Categories/BOM tabs and RM Repository source_type/bom_level filters all functional.

issues: Console warning: 'Select is changing from uncontrolled to controlled' - minor React state management issue in filter dropdowns
Console errors: 'Failed to load resource: 404' for dashboard data endpoints - not related to Phase 1 module

action_items: MINOR: Fix controlled/uncontrolled state warning in RMRepository.js filter Select components (use empty string instead of undefined for initial values)
critical_code_review_comments: All 19 backend API tests passed - Phase 1 module fully functional
GET /api/production/rm-categories returns categories with source_type and bom_level
GET /api/production/rm-categories?source_type=MANUFACTURED filter works correctly
GET /api/production/rm-categories/{code} returns single category
POST /api/production/rm-categories creates new category with source_type and bom_level
PUT /api/production/rm-categories/{code} updates category
GET /api/rm-bom returns BOMs list (empty state working)
GET /api/rm-bom?category=INP filter works
GET /api/rm-bom?bom_level=2 filter works
GET /api/raw-materials/by-tags?source_type=MANUFACTURED filter works
GET /api/raw-materials/by-tags?source_type=PURCHASED filter works
GET /api/raw-materials/by-tags?source_type=BOTH filter works
GET /api/raw-materials/by-tags?bom_level=1 filter works
GET /api/raw-materials/by-tags?bom_level=2 filter works
Combined filters (source_type + bom_level) work correctly
Pagination working correctly with total_pages calculation
TechOps page loads with RM Categories and RM BOM tabs
RM Categories tab shows categories with Source Type and BOM Level columns
Add Category dialog has all required fields including Source Type and BOM Level dropdowns
RM BOM tab shows empty state with Add BOM button
Add BOM dialog has all required fields for creating BOMs
RM Repository page has Source Type and BOM Level filter dropdowns
RM Repository table shows Source and Level columns with correct data
Source Type filter correctly filters by PURCHASED, MANUFACTURED, BOTH
BOM Level filter correctly filters by L1, L2, L3

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements verified, all filters working)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_PHASE1 category during testing. 16 RM categories exist with source_type and bom_level. 996 RMs with source_type=MANUFACTURED, 1554 RMs with bom_level=1.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 In-House RM Production module fully tested. Key verifications: 1) TechOps page at /techops has RM Categories and RM BOM tabs. 2) RM Categories shows source_type and bom_level columns. 3) Add Category dialog has Source Type (PURCHASED/MANUFACTURED/BOTH) and BOM Level (L1-L4) dropdowns. 4) RM BOM tab shows empty state with Add BOM button. 5) RM Repository at /rm-repository has Source Type and BOM Level filter dropdowns. 6) Table shows Source and Level columns. 7) All filters work correctly. Backend APIs: /api/production/rm-categories, /api/rm-bom, /api/raw-materials/by-tags with source_type and bom_level params.

backend_api.GET /api/production/rm-categories: PASS - Returns 16 categories with source_type and bom_level
backend_api.POST /api/production/rm-categories: PASS - Creates category with source_type and bom_level

frontend_ui.RM Categories table columns: PASS - Code, Name, Description, Source Type, BOM Level, Status, Actions
frontend_ui.RM BOM empty state message: PASS - 'No BOMs defined. Create BOMs for manufactured RMs.'
